title: Oops All Flowers
description: Blocks now replace flowers instead of being placed on top of them.
body:
**Oops All Flowers 🌼**

A simple quality-of-life mod that makes block placement smoother and less annoying.

Normally in Minecraft, placing a block on flowers places the block above them instead of replacing them.
With Oops All Flowers, flowers are automatically replaced when placing blocks, so you no longer need to break them first.

![line](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/527abaedd8b1e2895425af4e85b6aa6c18310531.png)

**Features ✨**

🌼 Automatically replaces flowers during block placement

🧱 Place blocks directly where flowers are

⚡ Faster and smoother building

🎮 Vanilla-friendly behavior

🪶 Lightweight and simple

🔧 Perfect for builders and survival players

![line](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/527abaedd8b1e2895425af4e85b6aa6c18310531.png)

**Why**?

Because breaking flowers every single time gets annoying fast.

Supported

✅ Singleplayer

✅ Multiplayer

✅ Modpacks

A tiny mod that makes building feel much better.

![line](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/527abaedd8b1e2895425af4e85b6aa6c18310531.png)

![intelij](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2f981cdb0f9bd8d718bf44ee4eb86d402e673891.png)

This mod have been created with IntelliJ

❗ NOT AN OFFICIAL MINECRAFT PRODUCT
NOT APPROVED BY OR ASSOCIATED WITH MOJANG OR MICROSOFT
